title:
Case No. C29586916, SKC-11/2024. Decision of the Supreme Court of the Republic of Latvia (Senate) of 17 January 2024.
ECLI:LV:AT:2024:0117.C29586916.14.S,

Latvia
text:
The cassation complaint did not dispute the
district court's decision that the parties' intention regarding the disputed
time period was to be interrelated and there is no dispute about the existence
of the permission to use the musical works. The court determines the
compensation amount only if it recognizes that the compensation rate set by the
collective management organization is not fair. This knowledge is also
applicable to the determination of revenues from which royalties can be
calculated.
issuing_authority: Supreme Court of the Republic of Latvia
